title: HorizonLimit
description: Invisible borders separating heaven and earth
body:
[日本語](https://github.com/YukkuriLaboratory/HorizonLimit/blob/main/README.md)

This mod adds horizontal border in your world.

By configuring side of borders and heights for each player is set for each dimensions, so that players cannot enter altitudes below (or above) it.


### Commands
- `/hl count <time>`  
  Sets grace time when entering prohibited area.
- `/hl set <player> <dimension> <limit> <isSkySide>`  
  Sets limit height and side.


> This mod created for [しう(siu)]([https://www.youtube.com/@siu_lab](https://www.youtube.com/@siu_lab))'s project Haven and Earth Division Craft(JP)
> [![動画](http://img.youtube.com/vi/jok06_fjnqY/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jok06_fjnqY&list=PLAk_kz3mvfCt2QCbjwiKI_TGmYeFqleTm)
